name: Linguine W/Mushrooms & Garlic
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon butter with 2 tablespoons olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the garlic and cook until it wilts.
3. Add the mushrooms and cook until they begin to dry out slightly.
4. Stir in the remaining butter and olive oil, allowing them to melt completely.
5. Season with salt and pepper.
6. Toss the cooked, drained linguine with the mushroom mixture to thoroughly incorporate all ingredients.
7. Taste and adjust seasoning as desired before serving.
FROM: SUSAN AARONSON (PSTT79C)
